input:
Saʿd ibn Muʿādh suggested that a shed should be erected for the Prophet as his headquarters. He said: “You will have your horse ready. If we win, then that is what we want. If it is the other eventuality, then you will ride your horse to join the rest of our people. Those who have been left behind love you as much as we do. Had they thought you were going into war, they would not have stayed behind. They will protect you, give you good counsel and fight your enemies alongside you.” The Prophet thanked Saʿd and prayed for him.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 17: Badr: The First Major Battle

output.scene_title: Sa'd ibn Mu'adh Volunteers for the Prophet's Headquarters
output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 17: Badr: The First Major Battle

characters.name: Sa'd ibn Mu'adh
characters.appearance: Early 30s, medium build, strong facial features. Dark brown skin, short dark brown beard with slight black henna tint, neatly trimmed. Wearing light beige thobe, plain dark brown woolen cloak, white head cloth wrapped in a simple way. Worn leather sandals. Confident expression, direct gaze.

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Early 50s, medium build, dignified upright posture. Wearing a simple white thobe with a green cloak draped over shoulders, white turban with tail between shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown from behind, face never visible. Distinguished by green cloak and subtle warm light.

output.moral_lesson: Selflessness and kindness to others are essential qualities of a true companion and leader.
output.narrative_text: Sa'd ibn Mu'adh suggested a shed for the Prophet's headquarters. He promised the Prophet that if they win, he would ride his horse to join the rest. If not, those left behind would protect the Prophet and fight alongside him.

compliance.notes: Prophet shown from behind, backlit by sunlight. Sa'd ibn Mu'adh shown with full face, direct gaze. Emphasis on selflessness and kindness, suitable for children.

output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor illustration. Exterior of a 7th century Makkah mud-brick home. A slender Arab man with dark brown skin, short beard with black henna, off-white thobe, and brown cloak, standing in the doorway with a confident expression, looking directly at the viewer. Behind him, a dignified older man in white thobe and green cloak, white turban, seen entirely from behind, standing with hands clasped together. Simple mud-brick walls, clay water jug in corner. Medium shot, eye level. Warm golden palette. No modern objects.
